F:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc libAnimeCore.a CMakeFiles/AnimeCore.dir/src/common/config/Config.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/AnimeCore.dir/src/common/logger/Logger.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/AnimeCore.dir/src/common/thread/GlobalThreadPool.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/AnimeCore.dir/src/common/thread/ThreadPool.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/AnimeCore.dir/src/network/Connection.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/AnimeCore.dir/src/network/TcpServer.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/AnimeCore.dir/src/network/asio/AsioContextPool.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/AnimeCore.dir/src/network/buffer/RecvBuffer.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/AnimeCore.dir/src/network/protocol/Packet.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/AnimeCore.dir/src/network/protocol/PacketParser.cpp.obj
F:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ranlib.exe libAnimeCore.a
